author_rating_explanation: Both focus authors are affiliated with POSTECH (Graduate School of Artificial Intelligence / Department of Computer Science and Engineering). POSTECH is a well-known Korean university but is not listed in the top-tier or major-company bands and falls under the 0-5 bucket per the scoring rules.
